Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Risk Score Operational Payment Base and Model Output User Guide │ June 2026 │ V 1.1 9 

4.2 CCW Detailed MOFs 

The MOFs that CMS uses as inputs for the resolved risk scores vary by year, in accordance with CMS payment model 
requirements. The CMS annual Rate Announcements document these requirements.14 

The MOFs for each of the prospective risk adjustment models include only the HCCs that best predict future (next
